_comment: Canadian defence buyer patterns for CanadaBuys tender filtering. EN+FR, case-insensitive substring match. Reviewed 2026-05-11.
_license: Contains information licensed under the Open Government Licence – Canada

primary_buyers._doc: Direct match → 'high confidence' tier when combined with trailer keyword
patterns: centre de la sécurité des télécommunications

secondary_buyers._doc: Match in contractingEntityName only + DND/CAF as endUserEntitiesName required → 'high' tier. Alone → 'review' tier.

pspc_as_procuring_agent._doc: PSPC buys on behalf of DND — require DND as endUserEntitiesName for 'high'. Alone → skip (too broad).

end_user_dnd_patterns._doc: Patterns matched against endUserEntitiesName column to identify DND as end-user even when PSPC/DCC is the contracting entity.

_notes: CSE/CST buys classified IT-security equipment — relevant as organisation, but BPW trailer content rare.
PSPC alone: 90+ departments buy through PSPC; only include when DND is explicit end-user.
DCC: Construction company — include only when GSIN vehicle code OR trailer keyword is present.
Department-name variability: 90+ spelling variants exist in CanadaBuys; ProcureData.ca normalises these commercially.
Update for DDG (Defence Delivery Group) merger effective 2026-07-01: add 'defence delivery group' and 'ddg' to primary_buyers at that date.
